text.title: Strangler Pattern Checklist — Product Dev Team Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether strangler-pattern-checklist-product-dev-team applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the migration ≥6 weeks projected scope AND crosses a data store / service boundary?

branch.conclusion: Freeze legacy contract before any new code.
Block traffic shift; complete ACL coverage.

example.description: When `yes AND legacy_contract_unfrozen` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1-legacy-contract-frozen` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
